Health Adviser

Your intelligent digital health companion designed to help you manage prescriptions, track blood pressure trends, receive AI-powered wellness plans, and take control of your long-term health with confidence.

✓ Secure & Private   ✓ AI-Powered Insights   ✓ Easy to Use

Trusted by Health-Conscious Individuals

5,000+

Active Users

12,000+

Prescriptions Managed

30,000+

BP Records Logged

98%

User Satisfaction

Core Features

💬

Chat. Scribe.

Switch Between Conversation & Documentation Mode

In Chat Mode, discuss symptoms, upload photos, receive AI-powered treatment plans and test recommendations, or connect with a doctor.

In Scribe Mode, AI listens, transcribes consultations, generates structured notes, ICD-10 codes, and editable medical reports automatically.

🩺

For Medical Professionals

Boost Efficiency & Accuracy

Talk naturally with patients while AI listens and generates clinical notes, ICD-10 codes, treatment suggestions and next-step recommendations.

Instantly create structured, editable Word documents to save time and improve documentation quality.

🤖

AI Validated by Doctors

Machine Learning Meets Medicine

Our chatbot uses LLMs fine-tuned on real medical data and established protocols.

Every recommendation, treatment plan and test is validated by medical professionals to ensure clinical reliability.

🌍

Access for Everyone

Start with Our Free Plan

Get ten free questions per month after signup. Upgrade anytime for additional questions or unlimited access.

Contact Us
